violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the warewashing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Raw eggs were observed stored over containers of milk on the walk-in shelving unit. Raw animal foods must be separated or stored properly to prevent contamination of ready to eat food items during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Per interview with the staff, coffee pots are not sanitized after washing and rinsing them with the powder chemical used for cleaning. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. (Establishment did have Quaternary Ammonium tablets on hand. Proper use of tablets for sanitizing was reviewed at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

At the time of inspection, the 3 bay sink was observed in need of repair. The metal dividers separating the wash/rinse/sanitize bays were observed to be detached at the bottom not allowing for proper filling of each separate bay. 3 bay sink is to be repaired or replaced for proper use when washing, rinsing, and sanitizing coffee equipment. (Small cooler/container was placed in the sanitizer bay for proper sanitizing as a temporary use until repaired or replaced.) New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing tablet solution for the 3-bay sink. (Proper water/tablet solution was tested at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back room area, is not tight-fitting (gap at the bottom door sweep area). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

Cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and the retail floor. Pressurized BEVERAGE containers, cased FOOD in waterproof containers such as bottles or cans, and milk containers IN PLASTI CRATES may be stored on a floor that is clean and not exposed to floor moisture. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2024
Ceiling tiles were observed to be stained from previous water damage. Ceiling tiles are to be maintained in good repair and replaced as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2024
